events.title: Security Events
events.noMatch: No events match the current filters

skills.title: Skill Scan Management
skills.noSkills: No trusted skills found. Skills will appear here after the scanner evaluates them.

selfProtection.label: Protect Sensitive Paths
selfProtection.help: Block reads, writes, deletes, and searches that target protected paths, important skills, or try to delete files outside the current workspace.

commandBlock.label: Block High-Risk Commands
commandBlock.help: Block clear high-risk shell patterns such as rm -rf / and curl | sh.

encodingGuard.label: Guard Encoded Payloads
encodingGuard.help: Detect bounded base64/base32/hex/url-encoded payloads that hide risky commands or exfiltration logic.

scriptProvenanceGuard.label: Track Script Provenance
scriptProvenanceGuard.help: Track newly written scripts in the current run and block later execution when they carry risky command or exfiltration signals.

memoryGuard.label: Guard Memory Writes
memoryGuard.help: Reject suspicious or oversized writes to memory_store, MEMORY.md, SOUL.md, and memory/.

loopGuard.label: Enable Loop Guard
loopGuard.help: Stop repeated mutating tool calls after the allowed retry budget per run.

exfiltrationGuard.label: Guard Exfiltration Chains
exfiltrationGuard.help: Track prior tool calls per run and block suspicious outbound chains that resemble SSRF or secret exfiltration.

userRiskScan.label: Scan User Intent
userRiskScan.help: Detect jailbreak, secret-exfiltration, and plugin-tampering requests in message_received.

skillScan.label: Scan Skills
skillScan.help: Enable the lightweight local skill scanner for ~/.openclaw/skills and ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills.

toolResultScan.label: Scan Tool Results
toolResultScan.help: Scan toolResult content for prompt-injection, secret-request, and exfiltration patterns.

outputRedaction.label: Redact Sensitive Output
outputRedaction.help: Mask API keys, tokens, and similar sensitive values before assistant output is sent or persisted.

promptGuard.label: Inject Prompt Guards
promptGuard.help: Inject static and one-shot safety reminders during before_prompt_build.

dispatchGuard.label: Dispatch Guard
dispatchGuard.help: Intercept dangerous operation requests before they reach the AI agent and before LLM replies, including openclaw CLI commands, protected path destruction, and tool call bypass attempts.

toolCallEnforcement.label: Enforce Tool Call Only
toolCallEnforcement.help: Inject prompt rules requiring all destructive operations to go through standard tool calls, preventing bypass of security hooks.
